expo.name: FireSafe ITM
expo.description: Professional fire protection systems inspection app following NFPA 25 standards. Manage inspections, generate PDF reports, and track maintenance schedules.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: FireSafe ITM requests your location only while you are actively using the app to record the GPS coordinates of the inspection site on your report. Location is used solely for documentation purposes and is never collected in the background.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FireSafe ITM uses the camera to capture photos of fire protection equipment, such as sprinklers, fire pumps, and hydrants, during on-site inspections. These photos are attached to inspection reports for documentation and compliance with NFPA 25 standards.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FireSafe ITM accesses your photo library so you can select existing photos of fire protection equipment to attach to inspection reports. This helps document equipment conditions for compliance with NFPA 25 standards.

plugins.photosPermission: FireSafe ITM accesses your photo library so you can select existing photos of fire protection equipment to attach to inspection reports for NFPA 25 compliance documentation.
plugins.cameraPermission: FireSafe ITM uses the camera to capture photos of fire protection equipment during on-site inspections. These photos are attached to reports for documentation and compliance with NFPA 25 standards.
